feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Material master migration using LTMC
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Good day.

 

I know that we can create a new material master using the LTMC process, however I wanted to know if LTMC provides the flexibility to change the existing view of a material master which is already created in SAP.

 

 

 

Best PERSON_NAME,

 

[removed by moderator] PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4HANA CM - CRM: Competitor Products
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

In S/4HANA Customer Management, I want to create a competitor product within the opportunity document. However, the competitor product creation component and the "New" button available in R3 are missing. Additionally, how can I associate the competitor product with the competitor?

Thanks for feedback.

entry.title: No applicable data found FIORI APP Projects - Actuals
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

FIORI app Projects - Actuals No applicable data found error when I add measurement item WBS Element. We have 200 WBS items, issue is occurring at one WBS Element and rest of them are fine. One strange thing is I can see data if I try it through Query Browser Catalog. 

when I checked at GL Account Hierarchy of selection Prompts, GL Account Hierarchy Key are different between CDS and Projects - Actuals  like 

1000X_XX_XX - H109/1000/X_XX_XX

1000ZXXXXXX - H109/1000/ZXXXXXX

Could you help me advice on this matter? Thanks

entry.title: Can't choose Cloud Foundry when create Project in BAS
entry.content:
When I create new Project BAS, if I choose Data source = Connect to a System, can't choose Cloud Foundry in deployment configuration.

As I created before I can choose Cloud Foundry.

Could you please help me to solve this issue?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: FB60 - Postings with Captive and Pro-rata VAT
entry.content:
Dear experts,

How can I post a vendor invoice through FB60 with both Captive and Pro-rata VAT?

Could you show prints of a posting including the aforementioned requirements?

Thanks

entry.title: clean core on-prem, define background job
entry.content:
Hi all,

we run S/4 HANA 2023 FP1 on-prem. We started our journey to become our core more clean. What I've learned about clean core is that Z-Reports are not allowed anymore as they can't be created in public cloud.

Now I need to create a new background job. Typically we will develop reports and schedule them. But creating a custom report violates clean core approach.

So I wonder what will be the right substitution for a custom report in case of background job? As said, we're on-premise. I'm not able to define a class or method as job step in SM36

BR Patrick

entry.title: Migrate data with CDS view behaviour in migration cockpit
entry.content:
I just want to know how to migrate data with CDS view behaviour in migration cockpit, Kindly provide us with the document if there any for the same.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: I cannot connect to it (for example, via SSH, RDP or SAP GUI)
entry.content:
Dear All,

My SAP CAL appliance is with the status Active and I cannot connect to it (for example,
via SSH, RDP or SAP GUI)

Kindly help me.

Regards,

Arsul

entry.title: Cross border goods ownership
entry.content:
Hi All

A company has legal entity in country X and Y. Customer places order in country Y which they fulfill from country X through intercompany and drop shipment. While sending goods from country X to customer in country Y, at what stage ownership should get transferred to legal entity Y and how can that owner ship be defined in system?

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

NS

entry.title: PMIS - Planner group analysis additional input parameter
entry.content:
Hi 

Business wants to have additional input parameters in Transaction MCI4 - PMIS _ Planner group analysis app, 
Input parameters are Order type and user status. 

In some SAP notes observed PMIS -planner group analysis report going to update some of table. 

Please suggest on proceeding for enhancement on above parameter will have any impact with future table upgradation.
Also suggest will enhancement logic for input parameter will works for this report. 

Thanks and Regards

Jagadeesh

entry.title: Difference in the value of the condition associated with the withholding tax between SD/FI document
entry.content:
Hi

I am having a problem related to the amount associated with the withholding tax, that is, on the SD side the amount is correct, but when it creates the accounting document, it makes the calculation based on the total net amount, but it is not what is intended.

In this case, the intention is to calculate the withholding tax based on the value associated with a condition type in the pricing schema and not on the total net value.

In SD, in the condition tables you have the expected value, but when you save it in the FI document it always calculates on the total net value.

I've run several tests and changed the points associated with the basic amount of the F2 (retention code associated with the customer master data that it then pulls from the VK13), such as “Mon.liq modified”, but I still can't do it.

Has anyone had this problem?

Thanks

entry.title: Working on Fiori Maintenance Form Template or SFP Transaction in SAP GUI for QM_SAMPLE_LABEL1?
entry.content: What is the best practice when working in S/4HANA 2023, working on Fiori Maintenance Form Template or SFP transaction in SAP GUI for form QM_SAMPLE_LABEL1?

entry.title: Form QM_SAMPLE_LABEL1 version S/4HANA 2023 in SFP
entry.content: It is necessary to create a Z of the standard form QM_SAMPLE_LABEL1 for the S/4HANA 2023 version. It is identified that due to the type of interface that the standard form has, it is convenient to work on said form in SFP. Is there any restriction if in the future it is desired that said form be worked on from SAP Fiori Maintain Form Template?

entry.title: GL Account Hierarchy name does not appear correctly in FIORI Actual Apps eg: Projects - Actuals
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

GL Account Hierarchy name does not appear correctly in FIORI Actual Apps eg: Projects - Actuals, Cost Centers - Actuals, . . .

it show up like 1000X_XX_XX instead of H109/1000/X_XX_XX

Kindly help.

entry.title: Extraction settings for CDS view to use via Cloud Connector/Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to use the standard view for data extraction (Example:I_NOTIFICATION) to Datasphere via Cloud connector.I see that data extraction and delta annotations are missing in this view .Is there any way  to add these settings other than creating another custom view on top that ?We use S/4 HANA On-premise environment.

Thanks & Regards,

Subra

entry.title: \/SCWM/PWR801,802 when Prod Order released to create PMR in EWM
entry.content:
hello Team, 

Our Production order when released , queue is getting stuck with the error "Quantity role Staging for Production Planned (W6) required for single-order staging " .  This is new upgrade box S/4 HANA 2023 . 

we did not see this error before.

entry.title: Extend EVENT in ABAP S4 HANA on premise
entry.content:
Hi Expert

It is required to add the new fields for filtering event ( event mesh)  "businesspartner/v1/BusinessPartner/Changed/" in S4 Hana On  premise system.

followed the video - 

" Extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud events with RAP and event filtering plus dynamic topics in S4HC "

this explained the cloud .

 

How can I do it in on premise ( Product version S4HANA ON PREMISE -2023 )?

Can you please share tutorial/video with steps ?

Thanks,

Rehan

entry.title: Returns of Vendor Consignment Goods
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

For consignment return to supplier, as per following SAP Help portal, Consignment return with shipment processing is allowed only for SAP retail.

 

Returns of Vendor Consignment Goods | SAP Help Portal

 

Please advise how consignment return to supplier can be processed with shipment where system is not SAP Retails and we have EWM integrated.

 

Regards,
PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Query about accruals in the rebate process 1B6 in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are implementing the 1B6 rebate process in #SAP S/4HANA, and the client has a specific requirement regarding the accruals for the condition contract.

The objective is for the corresponding accruals to be reflected individually in the conditions of each sales document or invoice that contributes to the business volume of the condition contract (these could be statistical if it is only possible to settle the accruals through Settlement Management). This would provide greater predictability and clarity for the client when granting other types of discounts.

We are currently investigating whether this can be achieved using standard functionality in SAP S/4HANA or if a custom development would be required.

Has anyone worked on a similar scenario or has experience with this type of configuration? Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Matías

entry.title: Has anyone experience with within a month go-live for a S/4HANA migration? I need some advices.
entry.content:
We are about to plan the Go-Live for our S/4HANA Greenfield implementation project.

The plan is to use a public holiday + weekend to go live. This should happen withing the month. Which risks are you seeing here? Can you provide me with some advices?

Many Thanks in advance!
